name: TR PDF Converter
description: Native Trade Republic PDF parser — extracts cash transactions, money market funds, and trading P&L. Direct import to Donkeyfolio activities with quantity + unit price. Ported from @jcmpagel's open-source converter.
author: Donkeyfolio

permissions.purpose: Add a sidebar entry and a route for the TR PDF converter page
Find or create the 'Trade Republic' account for direct import
Import parsed transactions directly as Donkeyfolio activities (optional alternative to CSV export)
